title: Abnormal Hatchery / New Spawn Eggs
description: New spawners for the Abnormals Team mods! All supported mods
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/594df8c6228262c516f219d3bb58fb278ce4369e.png)

**⚠️ Note:**

It’s still a work in progress, so some textures might be missing or updated later.

![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0c8d46c88c11f95b8a30f926751ec420371f2df.png)

**📖 About:**

Abnormal Hatchery gives a fresh new look to the spawn eggs from the [Abnormals Team mods](https://modrinth.com/organization/teamabnormals), making them more colorful, detailed, and consistent with the vanilla Minecraft style from 1.21.5. New textures are also planned to be added as new mobs are introduced to the various Team Abnormals mods.

![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0c8d46c88c11f95b8a30f926751ec420371f2df.png)

**📜 List of supported mods:**

- [Buzzier Bees](https://modrinth.com/mod/buzzier-bees/versions) 
- [Environmental](https://modrinth.com/mod/environmental)            
- [Atmospheric](https://modrinth.com/mod/atmospheric) 
- [Autumnity](https://modrinth.com/mod/autumnity) 
- [Upgrade Aquatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/upgrade-aquatic)          
- [Caverns & Chasms](https://modrinth.com/mod/caverns-and-chasms)         
- [Neapolitan](https://modrinth.com/mod/neapolitan)               
- [Endergetic Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/endergetic) 
- [Pet Cemetery](https://modrinth.com/mod/pet-cemetery) 
- [Savage & Ravage ](https://modrinth.com/mod/savage-and-ravage)         

Made with love ❤️

![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0c8d46c88c11f95b8a30f926751ec420371f2df.png)
